descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in Centennial Cup semifinal to advance to championship final against Humboldt Broncos.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in a Centennial Cup junior-A hockey semifinal on May 7, 1987, to advance to the championship final. With a 2-1 round-robin record, Richmond will face Saskatchewan champion Humboldt Broncos in a sudden-death final on May 8. Goals were scored by Dickie, Jaques, Hervey, Kozak, Rutherford, Phillips, Bobbitt, Bryon, and Hardy. The Sockeyes led 1-0 after one period and 3-0 after two.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes Advance to Centennial Cup Final
